mapper.select: SELECT TBC.ID, TBC.CHAT_CONTENT, TBC.CHAT_CREATE_AT, TBC.CHAT_TYPE, TBC.USER_ID, TBC.CHAT_ROOM_ID, TBU.USER_NICKNAME, TBU.USER_PROFILE FROM TBL_CHAT TBC JOIN TBL_USER TBU ON TBC.USER_ID = TBU.ID WHERE TBC.CHAT_ROOM_ID = #{chatRoomId} ORDER BY TBC.ID DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CHAT.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_CHAT (ID, CHAT_CONTENT, CHAT_TYPE, USER_ID, CHAT_ROOM_ID) VALUES (#{id}, #{chatContent}, #{chatType}, #{userId}, #{chatRoomId})
